name: Prune Chocolate Cup Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and chop the prunes.
2. Beat the eggs until thick and creamy.
3. Add cream, sugar to the beaten eggs and mix well.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
5. Mix in grated chocolate.
6. Add chopped prunes and vanilla to the batter and mix thoroughly.
7. Pour batter into greased muffin tins.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 15 minutes.
